title: Mach 5 Mining Impact Gloves
shortDescription: Multi-functional anti-vibration mechanical glove with finger, thumb palm and back protection. Maximum dexterity and non-slip performance. Synthetic leather palm and durable anti-slip PVC patches
description: Multi-functional anti-vibration mechanical glove with finger, thumb palm and back protection. Maximum dexterity and non-slip performance. Synthetic leather palm and durable anti-slip PVC patches

features: Multi-functional anti-vibration mechanical glove with finger, thumb palm and back protection
Synthetic leather palm and durable anti-slip PVC patches
Strengthened palm of the glove for gripping power in slippery conditions
High visibility composite poly/spandex knitted fabric for impact protection
Optimum balance between anti-slip and protection for back of hand
attributes.composition: Black triangular indent pattern PVC palm, index and thumb patch, double stitched; Black form fitting leatherette palm & knuckle area; Fluorescent yellow spandex back; Finer tipped; Velcro closing elasticated cuff
